originalTitle: South Africa trolled by African fans in wake of World Cup loss
title: South Africa trolled by African fans in wake of World Cup loss
content: The taunting reflects anger from parts of the continent over reports of xenophobia in South Africa.

originalTitle: Partey denied entry to Canada for Ghana's World Cup opener
title: Sad News for Our Football Star, Thomas Partey!
content:
Hello, my super friends! I have some news to share with you today. It's about football, our favourite sport! And it's about a very special player from our home, Ghana. His name is Thomas Partey. Today, we learned some sad news for Thomas. He will miss a very important football game. This game is for our country, Ghana, in a very big competition called the World Cup. He was supposed to play in Canada, far, far away, but he cannot go there right now. Let's find out why.

Who is Thomas Partey?

Thomas Partey is a wonderful football player. He comes from Ghana, just like us! He plays for our national team, the 'Black Stars'. He also plays for a big team in England called Arsenal. Thomas is a very important player. He runs a lot in the middle of the field. This job is called a midfielder. He helps his team score goals and also helps to stop the other team from scoring. He is very strong and fast. Did you know? A midfielder like Thomas Partey is like the engine of the team! They help the ball move from their own goal to the opponent's goal.

The Big Football Party: World Cup!

What is the World Cup? Imagine all the best football teams from different countries in the world playing against each other. It's a huge, happy football party! Every team wants to win a very big golden trophy. Our country, Ghana, is one of those special teams! We are so proud of our Black Stars. The World Cup only happens once every four years. So, it is a very, very big deal. Every game is important. Did you know? Football is the most popular sport in the whole wide world! Billions of people love to play and watch football.

Ghana's Black Stars

Our national team is called the Black Stars. This name comes from the black star on our country's flag. They wear beautiful jerseys with our Ghana colours. They play with so much heart and courage. We always cheer for them from our homes in Africa! When the Black Stars play, everyone in Ghana feels excited. We watch together and shout 'Go Ghana!'. Thomas Partey is a big part of this amazing team. He helps make our Black Stars shine very bright. Did you know? The black star on Ghana's flag is a symbol of African freedom!

Sad News for Thomas

Now, for the sad part. Thomas Partey was supposed to travel to a country called Canada. Canada is very far away from Ghana. Our Black Stars were going to play their first World Cup game there. The game was against a team from Panama. But Thomas Partey cannot go to Canada right now. He was not allowed to enter the country. This means he will miss the very first big World Cup game. It is a sad moment for him and for all of us who love to watch him play. It's like when you are excited to go to a friend's birthday party, but then something happens, and you cannot go. Thomas must feel a bit sad today.

What is 'Denied Entry'?

'Denied entry' means that a country says 'no' to someone who wants to visit. Every country has rules about who can come in. These rules are for everyone. Sometimes people need special papers to travel to other countries. If someone does not have the right papers, or if they do not follow all the rules, a country might say they cannot come in. We don't know all the details, but it means Thomas cannot enter Canada for now. It is important to always follow rules, especially when traveling. Did you know? When you travel to another country, you usually need a special book called a 'passport'! It shows who you are and where you are from.

The First Game in Canada

The first game for Ghana in the World Cup was planned for Canada. Canada is a very big country far, far away from Africa. Toronto is a big city in Canada where the game was supposed to happen. Ghana was set to play against Panama. Panama is another country, also very far away. Thomas was ready to play his best for Ghana in this important match. But now, he will not be on the field for this first game. Did you know? Canada is the second-biggest country in the whole world! It has lots of snow and beautiful forests.

The Team Will Play On!

Even though Thomas Partey cannot play in this first game, our Black Stars are still strong! They are a team, and they will play together. His friends on the team will play extra hard for Ghana. They will play extra hard for Thomas too. They know Thomas is watching and cheering for them from afar. Teamwork is very important in football. When one player cannot be there, others step up and give their very best. That is what a good team does! We will all cheer for our Black Stars. We will send them strong positive energy from Ghana. We know they will try their very best in Canada. Did you know? There are 11 players on a football team that play on the field at one time! Every player has a special job to do.

Our Hopes for Ghana

We wish the Ghana Black Stars good luck for their game in Canada! We hope they play wonderfully. And we hope that Thomas Partey will be able to join his team for other games in the World Cup soon. Go Black Stars, Go! We are proud of you!
summary: Ghana's star footballer, Thomas Partey, will miss the first big World Cup game in Canada because he was not allowed to enter the country.
whyMatters: This is important because Thomas Partey is a very good player for Ghana's national football team, and missing him for a big game like the World Cup makes it harder for our team, the Black Stars, but they will still play their best!

title: England have training equipment stolen
